name: Example Thesis One: Software Infrastructure
belief: The infrastructure layer of [your domain] compounds in value as the application layer fragments. Picking application winners is a losing game at early stage. Picking the substrate they all depend on is not.
qualifications: Core platform companies with defensible technical advantages
exclusions: Application wrappers without proprietary data or model differentiation
Thin feature layers on top of commodity infrastructure
Products that require platform lock-in to function but don't create it
conviction_signal: Replace this with what pattern in a deal gives you the highest conviction in this thesis.
